**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Jiangsu Haiyue Electric Technology Co., Ltd. demonstrates a strategic shift from Northeast China to the Yangtze River Delta. Originally founded as 'Harbin Hacheng Electric Technology Development' (indicated by its USCC 91230103), the company relocated its headquarters to Chongchuan District, Nantong City. While boasting a 20M RMB registered capital, its paid-in capital is under 1M RMB with only 3 insured employees. Crucially, its business scope explicitly states 'Production (limited to branch offices)' for major electrical equipment, while the headquarters focuses on wholesale, retail, design, technology consulting, and contracting (power facility installation). This clearly defines the Nantong entity as a sales, engineering design, and project contracting hub, rather than a primary manufacturing plant.
